ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "work_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work class of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the native country of the individual */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_work_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_class_id") REFERENCES work_classes ("work_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "work_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "work_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the work class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the work class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad, 11th) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marital status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marital status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial, Handlers-cleaners) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occupation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occupation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband, Wife) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sex was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sex was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the native country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the native country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., survey, observation) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_data_sources" (
  "individual_data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual-data source relationship */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual-data source relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual-data source relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_data_sources_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_data_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "dataset_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset metadata */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access_logs" (
  "dataset_access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset access log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
